productDisplayName: Lakme Women Absolute Flutter Secrets Dramatic Eyes Mascara B004
description: WHAT IT IS?The Lakme Absolute Flutter Secrets Dramatic Eyes Mascara Mascara has a long-term curl memory formula that gives your lashes the desired volume, color & lots of drama.WHAT IT DOES?Increases length and adds fantastic volume to your eyelashes with just one sweepWith long-term curl formula it multiples lash volume, to give you a clump-free lookFEATURESLong-term curl formulaLash multiplying and volumizingOphthalmologically testedWaterproofsmudge-resistantEasy to use applicatorABOUT THE COLLECTIONCrafted by backstage experts, bat your best eye lashes with the Lakme Absolute Flutter Secrets Dramatic Eyes Mascara. The Lakme Absolute Flutter Secrets Dramatic Eyes Mascara Mascara has a long term curl memory formula that gives your lashes the desired volume, color & lots of drama. Easy to use applicator, Easy to carry and a simple solution for dramatic volume and gorgeous lashes.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
